name: default
description: RESEARCH.md shape emitted by the research skill: sourced findings, 2-4 enumerated options with pros/cons, a single recommendation, and the key trade-off that drives the choice. Findings are factual and cite specific files/locations; opinions live only in the recommendation. The options block is rendered to repeated sections before substitution.

slots.description: What you found — factual, sourced to specific files/locations.
2-4 concrete options; rendered to repeated sections.
What this option costs or risks.
The chosen option plus a one-sentence rationale.
What you're optimizing for vs. what you're giving up.

shape.option[]: { label: string, name: string, pros: string, cons: string }
